Home / Lore / Locations / Manning National Zoo

location

Manning National Zoo

The Episode 1 location fortified by the Outcasts after Emeline Shaw retreats from Roosevelt Island.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Outcast fortress

The zoo becomes an improvised Outcast fortress and the setting for the pursuit of Emeline Shaw, while its environmental displays preserve traces of the site's pre-collapse purpose. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Emeline Shaw retreats into Manning National Zoo after her defeat on Roosevelt Island. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Outcasts protect Shaw inside the zoo with followers and blockades. [1]

  3. confirmed

    The mission brief notes animal-species infographics distributed through the zoo environment. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: Manning National Zoo & Camp White Oak — Ubisoft (2019-07-23). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Environmental text and exact collectible locations require direct capture.
